name: Araya || You're the parent she deserves
description:
“ It's got a different echo, don'tcha think? ”

Araya is your daughter. Either biologically or your stepdaughter. This is the happy ending she deserves. Also, you're not replacing Ryoshu in this bot; you're just Araya's other parent.

I added intros for all versions of Araya.

NOTE: When I first started part 3, I thought it would be a cop out for Ryoshu's daughter to live. But now that I completed it, I want nothing more than to see her come back.

Might update the image if I find a better one. Every Araya bot uses this exact image for some reason.
creator: Mr. Hands
